userData.mode: sf2 reduced attack baked from source-time remap

sourceReduction.goal: Street Fighter 2 style discrete read poses with procedural 3D easing between anchors.
sourceReduction.timingPolicy: preserve source keyframe burst around snap, then hold contact before recovery

spriteFrames.description: guard coiled head guard, level head, readable shift
guard coiled head guard, level head, snappy transition
strike forward head drive, level head, snappy transition
strike coiled head guard, level head, snappy transition
recovery coiled head guard, level head, held pose

guardRuleException.reason: Headbutt is allowed to break ordinary hand guard rules because the arms sell the head-driven body commitment and recoil.
guardRuleException.rule: Do not apply generic contact/recovery guard stabilization to Headbutt unless a visual test proves the arms stop selling the motion.
